name: Pop DS
short_description: Pop DS is a match 3 game with a twist, you POP (don't swap) gems to remove them. As you progress you will learn new moves and encounter lots of on grid interactive objects. Enjoy playing the game casually, or aim for a challenge worthy of a gamer and go for 100% completion!
detailed_description:
Love match 3 games? Want to play a new and unique match 3 game that puts a spin on the usual game play?

Well download our game for free with the option to pay for the rest of the game after already enjoying hours of the free content. We are indie devs with big dreams of making more games in the future, so any support would be greatly appreciated.

Downloading this game gives you access to 310 puzzle levels, 50 mission levels and two arcade levels. Supporting us gives you access to three bosses, one additional arcade level, 60 mission levels and all future content.

In this game you POP gems to remove them instead of swapping them, this gives you many options, as you don't need to make a match to make a move.

That's just the beginning! As you progress you will learn new moves and encounter lots of on grid interactive objects, which keep the game fresh and offer a unique challenge. For a good summary of what we have to offer, check out our videos above.

-Match 4 to create a power gem and unleash each gem's unique power.

-Match 5 to create the legendary rainbow gem which removes all gems of the colour it forms a match with.

-Enjoy playing the game casually, or aim for a challenge worthy of a gamer and go for 100% completion!
